skills.name: SQL Query Generator
skills.description:
Generates SQL queries from natural language descriptions.
Supports common SQL dialects (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite).
Includes query explanation and safety warnings for destructive operations.

input.description: Get all users who signed up in the last 30 days, ordered by signup date
input.schema: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, email TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP);

input.description: Delete all inactive users who haven't logged in for over a year
input.schema: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, last_login TIMESTAMP, active BOOLEAN);

skills.author: ai-skills-team
